heroHeadline: Trump Claims Iran Agreed to 'Most' of Peace Plan; Kharg Island Threat Raised; TSA Paychecks Restored; Markets Post 5th Straight Weekly Loss
heroSubtitle: Trump says Iran accepted 'most' of 15-point plan via Pakistani intermediaries but raises Kharg Island seizure option; TSA officers receive first paychecks under executive order as DHS shutdown enters Day 45 with Congress on recess; US equity markets post fifth consecutive weekly decline with S&P 500 down 7% YTD and Nasdaq in correction; March jobs report released on Good Friday
footerNote: Data sourced from White House, executive orders, court records, Reuters, AP, CBO, USTR, Pentagon, IEA. Economic data from BLS, BEA, Treasury, Goldman Sachs, Federal Reserve, OECD.
